title: Chris Moreton
text: Home * People * Chris Moreton Chris Moreton [1] Chris Moreton , a British computer scientist, B.Sc. in Computing and Informatics from Plymouth University in 1996, software and web application developer. Along with Russell Newman , Moreton has developed and maintains the Red Hot Pawn correspondence chess site [2] , and is co-author of the chess engine Rival [3] .
